use_condition_audit.use_condition: Use when explaining evidence interpretation uncertainty and limits
use_condition_audit.avoid_when: Avoid when source evidence is incomplete or contested beyond article scope

use_condition_audit.use_condition: Use when aligning claims proof points and audience messages
use_condition_audit.avoid_when: Avoid when evidence is thin or dissent is being suppressed

use_condition_audit.use_condition: Use only with explicit agency and context safeguards
use_condition_audit.avoid_when: Avoid when fear urgency or scarcity would bypass judgment

use_condition_audit.use_condition: Use when personas are evidence-informed and non-stereotyped
use_condition_audit.avoid_when: Avoid when personas are speculative demographic shortcuts

use_condition_audit.use_condition: Use when categories are documented and revisable
use_condition_audit.avoid_when: Avoid when taxonomy will freeze contested or evolving concepts
